name: Landeros & Associates Dentistry
tagline: Family & cosmetic dentistry with a gentle, unhurried touch
seoDescription: Landeros & Associates Family & Cosmetic Dentistry in Santa Rosa, CA. Gentle family care, cleanings, crowns, implants, Invisalign & veneers. Rated 4.7+ stars.

sections.heading: Honest, gentle dentistry for every Santa Rosa family
sections.subheading: Dr. Luke Landeros and Dr. Alyssa Peake provide patient-first family and cosmetic care on Guerneville Road, from a child's first cleaning to a full smile makeover.

items.title: Family & Preventive Dentistry
items.description: Routine cleanings, exams, and preventive care for patients of every age, with a gentle approach that helps kids and anxious patients feel at ease.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry & Veneers
items.description: Custom-crafted porcelain veneers and professional whitening to enhance the appearance of your smile and address chips, stains, and gaps.

items.title: Invisalign Clear Aligners
items.description: Discreet, removable aligners that straighten teeth and correct bite issues without traditional metal braces.

items.title: Crowns & Restorations
items.description: Custom-made crowns and tooth-shade composite fillings that restore decayed or damaged teeth while blending seamlessly with your smile.

items.title: Dental Implants & Dentures
items.description: Implant restorations and dentures to replace missing teeth and restore confident, comfortable function.

items.title: Emergency Dental Care
items.description: Help when you need it most. The team works to see patients with dental emergencies quickly, often within 24 hours.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Landeros & Associates Dentistry and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: About Landeros & Associates Dentistry
body: Landeros & Associates Family & Cosmetic Dentistry has cared for Santa Rosa families on Guerneville Road since Dr. Luke Landeros began practicing here in 2012. A California native raised in the Central Valley, Dr. Landeros earned his Bachelor's in Biological Sciences from the University of the Pacific and his DDS from UoP's Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry in San Francisco.

Patients consistently describe the practice the same way: calm, gentle, and genuinely focused on their health rather than the bottom line. Working alongside Dr. Landeros, Dr. Alyssa Peake brings a Doctorate from New York University College of Dentistry and a kind, unhurried chairside manner. Whether you're bringing a child in for a first exam or planning a smile makeover, the team meets you with respect and care.

items.quote: Dr. Landeros is the best dentist I've ever been to. He's patient, smart, precise, gentle, listens to questions and responds with depth and explanation, considers your concerns, not money hungry, realistic and truly wants the best for his patients.
items.author: Verified patient review

items.quote: From the front office staff, to the dental hygienists, I was greeted kindly and treated with respect. The major plus is that I could tell that Dr. L isn't in this business for profit, he genuinely wants to give me a healthy smile!
items.author: New patient

items.quote: Dr Luke Landeros is very skilled and gentle, and his staff is professional and friendly.

items.title: Rated 4.7 Stars On Yelp
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

sections.heading: Work with Landeros & Associates Dentistry
sections.body: Find us at 2448 Guerneville Rd. Call (707) 702-0594 — we’re glad to help.
